calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Nov-17-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Emily L. Brough; Zacks, Freedman & Patterson, PC; 415-956-8100; appearing on behalf of petitioner and plaintiff Mission APartments-8909-8936 S. Nogales Highway LLC.
Wayne K. Snodgrass; Deputy City Attorney; 415-554-4675; appearing on behalf of respondents and defendants San Francisco Residential Rent Stabilization and Arbitration Board and City and County of San Francisco.

Court reporter: Jane Hong, CSR #11975, CSRJane@hotmail.com, 909-831-2644.

Hearing held. The meaning of "original occupant" under Costa-Hawkins and the limits of rent control under the city ordinance are discussed. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MADAMUS is taken under submission.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Jane Hong, CSR #11975, CSRJane@hotmail.com, 909-831-2644. (D501)
